location: One-time guaranteed drop from the Fire Prelate boss inside Fort Laiedd, a fortress on Mt. Gelmir near the Seethewater Terminus Site of Grace.
tactics: Fort Laiedd is full of Fire Monks before you reach the Prelate — clear a path or run past them to the fog gate
The Fire Prelate swings its own colossal hammer in wide, fire-infused arcs and can knock you off elevated ground, so fight it on open, flat footing
Unlike most named colossal weapons, this one can be infused with a different Ash of War if you don't want to keep its innate Prelate's Charge skill
lore: A colossal hammer wreathed in the look of roiling flame, carried by the Prelates who lead the Fire Monks; its sheer mass is enough to send anyone it strikes flying into the air.

builds.name: Pure Strength colossal build
builds.why: C-scaling Strength with a low Dexterity requirement, plus the option to re-infuse it thanks to its rare buffable status among named colossals.
